specific_mechanism: RAM-COMM: Ramanujan-expander backbone for multi-LLM-agent message-passing
llm_application: Connect N LLM-agents via a Ramanujan d-regular expander graph (provably good spectral gap); broadcast messages traverse log(N) hops with bounded mixing time.
novelty_claim: Existing multi-agent comm uses fully-connected or chain topology. Ramanujan offers provably-optimal sparse spectral mixing.
